items.title: JTO pumps 40% – Will Jito reclaim $1 ahead of the JTX Trade debut?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jito's price surge indicates increased interest, which could enhance liquidity and trading volume in the Solana ecosystem ahead of the JTX Trade launch.

items.title: Pump.fun activity craters 80% in three months, dragging Solana fees lower as traders rotate into perps
items.whyYouShouldCare: The significant drop in Pump.fun activity and associated fees suggests a shift in trader focus, impacting Solana's revenue and overall market dynamics.

items.title: XRP just beat Ethereum, Solana and others in 90-Day RWA flows as traders pile back into the token
items.whyYouShouldCare: XRP's strong performance in real-world asset flows highlights competitive pressures on Solana, potentially affecting its market positioning and investor sentiment.
